headline: Jump Launches AI Associate: Agentic Execution Across CRM, Email, and Planning Systems for 27,000+ Advisors
summary: Jump has launched AI Associate, an agentic execution layer that moves beyond surfacing insights to taking direct action across an advisor's tech stack — updating CRM records, drafting and sending client emails with full context, scheduling follow-ups, and logging life events. The product extends Jump's existing meeting intelligence into three categories: Meet (meeting-to-action), Grow (organic growth acceleration), and Operate (back-office automation). Jump now serves 27,000+ advisors, was ranked #1 in advisor satisfaction and adoption in both the 2025 and 2026 T3/Inside Information Software Surveys, and has 20+ AI-powered features across its platform. COO Tim Chaves framed the launch as addressing the industry's execution gap: 'The industry doesn't just need more insights — it needs execution.'
the_so_what: Jump is the first advisor AI platform to cross from passive intelligence into agentic execution — where the AI initiates CRM updates, generates proposals, and triggers follow-ups without advisor intervention. Morgan Stanley's Debrief captures meeting notes at 98% adoption but doesn't act on them. Altruist's Hazel queries custodial data but doesn't write to external systems. Jump's AI Associate does both: it reads context and takes action across CRM, email, and planning tools. At 27,000 advisors, it has the distribution to make this the new baseline expectation for advisor AI.

key_stat.label: advisors on Jump platform, ranked #1 in advisor satisfaction (T3 Survey 2025 & 2026)

capability_evidence.evidence: AI Associate is live, enabling advisors to take action across CRM, email, and financial planning systems. 27,000+ advisors on platform. #1 in T3/Inside Information Survey 2025 and 2026. 20+ AI features.

entities.key_topic: Agentic AI execution layer for advisors

landscape_context.peer_comparison: Morgan Stanley Debrief (scaled, 98% adoption, meeting notes only), Altruist Hazel (deployed, custodial queries only)

_research.whats_new: Shift from passive meeting intelligence to agentic execution — AI now takes action across CRM, email, planning tools. Previous coverage was $80M Series B and meeting intelligence.
